title: [Lirafyr Cottage, Kitchenette]
description: Paneled, dark-stained walls enclose this small kitchen; countertops line the eastern wall along with a rhimar-lined box, cooking stove, and sink.  Matching counters make up an island in the center of the room with a silver trashbin resting against it, and a small brass chandelier hangs overhead surrounded by pots and pans.  Through a double-arch to the south is a little breakfast nook with a bay window, while a matching archway to the north leads into a library carved out of the base of the sequoia tree.
